   276→
   277→async def send_batch(
   278→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   279→    template: str,
   280→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   281→    search_keywords: List[str],
   282→    browser: BrowserManager,
   283→    skip_messaged: bool,
   284→    interactive: bool = False,
   285→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   286→    mode: "SearchMode" = None,
   287→    exchange_phone: bool = False,
   288→    exchange_wechat: bool = False,
   289→) -> dict:
   290→    """Send messages to a batch of candidates, sorted by score.
   291→
   292→    Dispatches to the appropriate message module function based on mode.
   293→
   294→    Args:
   295→        candidates: List of CandidateBasic objects
   296→        template: Template name
   297→        variables: Template variables
   298→        search_keywords: Original search keywords (for scoring)
   299→        browser: BrowserManager instance
   300→        skip_messaged: Whether to skip already-messaged candidates
   301→        interactive: Enable interactive selector discovery (Path A only)
   302→        skip_confirmation: Skip interactive confirmation prompt
   303→        mode: Search mode — determines which send path to use
   304→        exchange_phone: Click "交换电话" in IM tab (Path C only)
   305→        exchange_wechat: Click "交换微信" in IM tab (Path C only)
   306→
   307→    Returns:
   308→        Results dict with total/sent/failed/skipped/rate_limited counts
   309→    """
   310→    if mode is None:
   311→        mode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER
   312→
   313→    sorted_candidates = sort_candidates_by_score(candidates, search_keywords=search_keywords)
   314→    dicts = _candidates_to_dicts(sorted_candidates)
   315→
   316→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   317→        return await send_message_batch_enterprise(
   318→            page=browser.page,
   319→            candidates=dicts,
   320→            template_name=template,
   321→            common_variables=variables,
   322→            browser=browser,
   323→            skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   324→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   325→        )
   326→    elif mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK:
   327→        return await send_message_batch_talent_bank(
   328→            page=browser.page,
   329→            candidates=dicts,
   330→            template_name=template,
   331→            common_variables=variables,
   332→            browser=browser,
   333→            skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   334→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   335→            exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   336→            exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   337→        )
   338→    elif mode == SearchMode.RECRUIT_MANAGE:
   339→        return await send_message_batch_recruit_manage(
   340→            page=browser.page,
   341→            candidates=dicts,
   342→            template_name=template,
   343→            common_variables=variables,
   344→            browser=browser,
   345→            skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   346→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   347→            exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   348→            exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   349→        )
   350→    else:
   351→        return await send_message_batch(
   352→            candidates=dicts,
   353→            template_name=template,
   354→            common_variables=variables,
   355→            browser=browser,
   356→            skip_messaged=skip_messaged,
   357→            interactive=interactive,
   358→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   359→        )

   362→def generate_pipeline_report(
   363→    candidates: List[CandidateBasic],
   364→    results: dict,
   365→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   366→    template: str,
   367→    mode: SearchMode,
   368→) -> str:
   369→    """Generate an Excel report for a pipeline run.
   370→
   371→    Args:
   372→        candidates: All candidates from search
   373→        results: Send results dict (total/sent/failed/skipped/rate_limited/details)
   374→        keywords: Search keywords used
   375→        template: Template name used
   376→        mode: Search mode (search_center or enterprise)
   377→
   378→    Returns:
   379→        Path to the generated report file
   380→    """
   381→    from openpyxl import Workbook
   382→    from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
   383→    from loguru import logger
   384→
   385→    timestamp = datetime.now()
   386→    config = get_config()
   387→    report_dir = Path(config.get("data.report_dir", "data/reports"))
   388→    report_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   389→    report_path = report_dir / f"pipeline_{timestamp.strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.xlsx"
   390→
   391→    wb = Workbook()
   392→
   393→    # --- Sheet 1: Overview ---
   394→    ws_overview = wb.active
   395→    ws_overview.title = "概览"
   396→
   397→    header_font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
   398→    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="4472C4", end_color="4472C4", fill_type="solid")
   399→    border = Border(
   400→        left=Side(style="thin"),
   401→        right=Side(style="thin"),
   402→        top=Side(style="thin"),
   403→        bottom=Side(style="thin"),
   404→    )
   405→
   406→    overview_rows = [
   407→        ("执行时间", timestamp.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")),
   408→        ("搜索关键词", ", ".join(keywords)),
   409→        ("消息模板", template),
   410→        ("搜索模式", mode.value),
   411→        ("搜索结果数", results["total"]),
   412→        ("发送总数", results["sent"] + results["failed"]),
   413→        ("成功", results["sent"]),
   414→        ("失败", results["failed"]),
   415→        ("跳过(已沟通)", results["skipped"]),
   416→        ("限流", results["rate_limited"]),
   417→    ]
   418→
   419→    for r_idx, (key, value) in enumerate(overview_rows, 1):
   420→        cell_key = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=1, value=key)
   421→        cell_val = ws_overview.cell(row=r_idx, column=2, value=value)
   422→        cell_key.font = Font(bold=True)
   423→        for cell in (cell_key, cell_val):
   424→            cell.border = border
   425→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center")
   426→
   427→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["A"].width = 18
   428→    ws_overview.column_dimensions["B"].width = 40
   429→
   430→    # --- Sheet 2: Candidate Details ---
   431→    ws_details = wb.create_sheet(title="候选人详情")
   432→
   433→    columns = ["序号", "姓名", "职位", "公司", "地区", "脉脉ID", "沟通状态", "发送内容", "失败原因"]
   434→    for c_idx, col_name in enumerate(columns, 1):
   435→        cell = ws_details.cell(row=1, column=c_idx, value=col_name)
   436→        cell.font = header_font
   437→        cell.fill = header_fill
   438→        cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center")
   439→        cell.border = border
   440→
   441→    # Build a lookup from maimai_id -> detail
   442→    details_by_id: Dict[str, dict] = {}
   443→    for detail in results.get("details", []):
   444→        details_by_id[detail["maimai_id"]] = detail
   445→
   446→    status_map = {
   447→        "sent": "已发送",
   448→        "failed": "失败",
   449→        "skipped": "跳过",
   450→        "rate_limited": "限流",
   451→    }
   452→
   453→    for r_idx, c in enumerate(candidates, 1):
   454→        detail = details_by_id.get(c.maimai_id, {})
   455→        raw_status = detail.get("status", "not_attempted")
   456→        status_label = status_map.get(raw_status, "未处理")
   457→        reason = detail.get("reason", "")
   458→
   459→        content = detail.get("content", "")
   460→        row_data = [
   461→            r_idx,
   462→            c.name,
   463→            c.title,
   464→            c.company,
   465→            c.location or "",
   466→            c.maimai_id,
   467→            status_label,
   468→            content,
   469→            reason,
   470→        ]
   471→        for c_idx, value in enumerate(row_data, 1):
   472→            cell = ws_details.cell(row=r_idx + 1, column=c_idx, value=value)
   473→            cell.border = border
   474→            cell.alignment = Alignment(vertical="center", wrap_text=True)
   475→
   476→    detail_widths = {"A": 6, "B": 12, "C": 25, "D": 20, "E": 12, "F": 18, "G": 12, "H": 40, "I": 30}
   477→    for col, width in detail_widths.items():
   478→        ws_details.column_dimensions[col].width = width
   479→
   480→    ws_details.freeze_panes = "A2"
   481→    ws_details.auto_filter.ref = ws_details.dimensions
   482→
   483→    wb.save(str(report_path))
   484→    logger.info(f"Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}")
   485→    console.print(f"[green]Pipeline report saved to: {report_path}[/green]")
   486→    return str(report_path)
   487→
   488→
   489→def save_run_history(
   490→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   491→    template: str,
   492→    mode: SearchMode,
   493→    results: dict,
   494→    dry_run: bool,
   495→    report_path: Optional[str] = None,
   496→) -> None:
   497→    """Append a pipeline run record to JSON and regenerate Markdown summary.
   498→
   499→    Produces two files under data/:
   500→    - run_history.json: machine-readable array of all runs
   501→    - run_history.md: human-readable Markdown table
   502→    """
   503→    import json
   504→    from loguru import logger
   505→
   506→    data_dir = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent / "data"
   507→    data_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   508→    json_path = data_dir / "run_history.json"
   509→    md_path = data_dir / "run_history.md"
   510→
   511→    # Read existing records
   512→    records: List[dict] = []
   513→    if json_path.exists():
   514→        try:
   515→            records = json.loads(json_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
   516→        except (json.JSONDecodeError, IOError):
   517→            logger.warning("Failed to read run_history.json, starting fresh")
   518→
   519→    # Build new record
   520→    timestamp = datetime.now()
   521→    record = {
   522→        "timestamp": timestamp.isoformat(timespec="seconds"),
   523→        "keywords": list(keywords),
   524→        "template": template,
   525→        "mode": mode.value if isinstance(mode, SearchMode) else mode,
   526→        "dry_run": dry_run,
   527→        "total": results.get("total", 0),
   528→        "sent": results.get("sent", 0),
   529→        "failed": results.get("failed", 0),
   530→        "skipped": results.get("skipped", 0),
   531→        "rate_limited": results.get("rate_limited", 0),
   532→        "report_file": Path(report_path).name if report_path else None,
   533→    }
   534→    records.append(record)
   535→
   536→    # Write JSON
   537→    json_path.write_text(json.dumps(records, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   538→
   539→    # Regenerate Markdown from full history
   540→    lines = [
   541→        "# Pipeline 运行历史",
   542→        "",
   543→        "| 时间 | 关键词 | 模板 | 模式 | 搜索数 | 发送 | 失败 | 跳过 | 限流 | 报告 |",
   544→        "|------|--------|------|------|--------|------|------|------|------|------|",
   545→    ]
   546→    for r in records:
   547→        ts = r["timestamp"][:16].replace("T", " ")
   548→        kws = ", ".join(r["keywords"])
   549→        tpl = r["template"]
   550→        m = r["mode"]
   551→        total = str(r["total"])
   552→        if r.get("dry_run"):
   553→            sent = failed = skipped = rate_limited = "-"
   554→        else:
   555→            sent = str(r["sent"])
   556→            failed = str(r["failed"])
   557→            skipped = str(r["skipped"])
   558→            rate_limited = str(r["rate_limited"])
   559→        report = r.get("report_file") or "-"
   560→        lines.append(
   561→            f"| {ts} | {kws} | {tpl} | {m} | {total} | {sent} | {failed} | {skipped} | {rate_limited} | {report} |"
   562→        )
   563→
   564→    md_path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
   565→    logger.info(f"Run history updated: {json_path}")
   566→    console.print(f"[dim]运行历史已更新: {md_path}[/dim]")
   567→
   568→
   569→def display_candidates_table(candidates: List[CandidateBasic], title: str) -> None:
   570→    """Display a Rich table of candidates."""
   571→    table = Table(title=f"{title} ({len(candidates)} candidates)")
   572→    table.add_column("#", style="dim", justify="right")
   573→    table.add_column("Name", style="cyan")
   574→    table.add_column("Title", style="green")
   575→    table.add_column("Company", style="yellow")
   576→    table.add_column("Location", style="blue")
   577→    has_scores = any(getattr(c, "score", None) is not None for c in candidates[:1])
   578→    if has_scores:
   579→        table.add_column("Score", style="magenta", justify="right")
   580→    table.add_column("ID", style="dim")
   581→
   582→    for i, c in enumerate(candidates[:50], 1):
   583→        row = [str(i), c.name, c.title, c.company, c.location or ""]
   584→        if has_scores:
   585→            row.append(str(getattr(c, "score", "")))
   586→        row.append(c.maimai_id)
   587→        table.add_row(*row)
   588→
   589→    console.print(table)
   590→
   591→    if len(candidates) > 50:
   592→        console.print(f"[dim]... and {len(candidates) - 50} more[/dim]")
   593→
   594→
   595→def display_send_results(
   596→    results: dict, title: str = "Send Results", quota: Optional[dict] = None
   597→) -> None:
   598→    """Display send results summary table."""
   599→    console.print()
   600→    result_table = Table(title=title)
   601→    result_table.add_column("Metric", style="bold")
   602→    result_table.add_column("Count", justify="right")
   603→
   604→    result_table.add_row("Total candidates", str(results["total"]))
   605→    result_table.add_row("Sent", f"[green]{results['sent']}[/green]")
   606→    result_table.add_row("Failed", f"[red]{results['failed']}[/red]")
   607→    result_table.add_row("Skipped (already messaged)", f"[yellow]{results['skipped']}[/yellow]")
   608→    result_table.add_row("Rate limited", f"[yellow]{results['rate_limited']}[/yellow]")
   609→    if quota:
   610→        result_table.add_row("联系券剩余", f"[cyan]{quota.get('uh_left', '?')}[/cyan]")
   611→
   612→    console.print(result_table)

   615→async def run_pipeline_default(
   616→    browser: BrowserManager,
   617→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   618→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   619→    location: Optional[str],
   620→    max_pages: int,
   621→    template: str,
   622→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   623→    dry_run: bool,
   624→    skip_messaged: bool,
   625→    interactive: bool = False,
   626→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   627→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   628→    exchange_phone: bool = False,
   629→    exchange_wechat: bool = False,
   630→    min_years: Optional[int] = None,
   631→    max_years: Optional[int] = None,
   632→) -> None:
   633→    """Pipeline: search all pages first, then send messages.
   634→
   635→    Saves a checkpoint after search completes so that message sending
   636→    can be resumed if interrupted.
   637→    """
   638→    checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   639→
   640→    # Talent bank / recruit_manage: search + send per keyword (page changes between keywords)
   641→    if mode in (SearchMode.TALENT_BANK, SearchMode.RECRUIT_MANAGE) and not dry_run:
   642→        all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   643→        seen_ids: Set[str] = set()
   644→        combined_results = {
   645→            "total": 0,
   646→            "sent": 0,
   647→            "failed": 0,
   648→            "skipped": 0,
   649→            "rate_limited": 0,
   650→            "details": [],
   651→        }
   652→
   653→        for idx, kw in enumerate(keywords):
   654→            mode_label = "Recruit manage" if mode == SearchMode.RECRUIT_MANAGE else "Talent bank"
   655→            console.print(f"\n[bold blue][{idx+1}/{len(keywords)}] {mode_label}: {kw}[/bold blue]")
   656→
   657→            if mode == SearchMode.RECRUIT_MANAGE:
   658→                kw_candidates = await search_candidates_recruit_manage(
   659→                    keywords=kw,
   660→                    company=company,
   661→                    pages=max_pages,
   662→                    browser=browser,
   663→                    min_years=min_years if idx == 0 else None,
   664→                    max_years=max_years if idx == 0 else None,
   665→                )
   666→            else:
   667→                kw_candidates = await search_candidates_talent_bank(
   668→                    keywords=kw,
   669→                    company=company,
   670→                    pages=max_pages,
   671→                    browser=browser,
   672→                    min_years=min_years if idx == 0 else None,
   673→                )
   674→
   675→            # Deduplicate
   676→            new_candidates = []
   677→            for c in kw_candidates:
   678→                if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids:
   679→                    seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
   680→                    new_candidates.append(c)
   681→
   682→            # Client-side location filter (recruit_manage/talent_bank have no server-side location filter)
   683→            if location and new_candidates:
   684→                before_count = len(new_candidates)
   685→                new_candidates = [
   686→                    c for c in new_candidates
   687→                    if location in (c.title or "") or location in (c.location or "")
   688→                ]
   689→                filtered_count = before_count - len(new_candidates)
   690→                if filtered_count:
   691→                    console.print(f"  [dim]Location filter '{location}': {filtered_count} excluded[/dim]")
   692→
   693→            all_candidates.extend(new_candidates)
   694→            console.print(f"  Found {len(new_candidates)} new candidates (deduplicated)")
   695→
   696→            if not new_candidates:
   697→                continue
   698→
   699→            display_candidates_table(new_candidates, f"Keyword: {kw}")
   700→
   701→            # Send messages immediately while page shows these results
   702→            kw_results = await send_batch(
   703→                new_candidates,
   704→                template,
   705→                variables,
   706→                [kw],
   707→                browser,
   708→                skip_messaged,
   709→                skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   710→                mode=mode,
   711→                exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   712→                exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   713→            )
   714→            for key in ("total", "sent", "failed", "skipped", "rate_limited"):
   715→                combined_results[key] += kw_results.get(key, 0)
   716→            combined_results["details"].extend(kw_results.get("details", []))
   717→
   718→        if not all_candidates:
   719→            console.print("[yellow]No candidates found for any keyword.[/yellow]")
   720→            return
   721→
   722→        quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   723→        display_send_results(combined_results, quota=quota)
   724→        report_path = generate_pipeline_report(
   725→            all_candidates, combined_results, keywords, template, mode
   726→        )
   727→        save_run_history(
   728→            keywords, template, mode, combined_results, dry_run=False, report_path=report_path
   729→        )
   730→        checkpoint.delete()
   731→        console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
   732→        _auto_backup_database()
   733→        return
   734→
   735→    if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   736→        # Keep enterprise tab open for inline messaging (unless dry_run)
   737→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   738→            browser,
   739→            keywords,
   740→            company,
   741→            max_pages,
   742→            keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   743→        )
   744→    elif mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK:
   745→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_talent_bank(
   746→            browser,
   747→            keywords,
   748→            company,
   749→            max_pages,
   750→            min_years=min_years,
   751→        )
   752→    elif mode == SearchMode.RECRUIT_MANAGE:
   753→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords_recruit_manage(
   754→            browser,
   755→            keywords,
   756→            company,
   757→            max_pages,
   758→            min_years=min_years,
   759→            max_years=max_years,
   760→        )
   761→    else:
   762→        all_candidates, seen_ids = await search_all_keywords(
   763→            browser,
   764→            keywords,
   765→            company,
   766→            location,
   767→            max_pages,
   768→        )
   769→
   770→    if not all_candidates:
   771→        console.print("[yellow]No candidates found for any keyword.[/yellow]")
   772→        return
   773→
   774→    # Client-side location filter for recruit_manage/talent_bank (no server-side location in these modes)
   775→    if location and mode in (SearchMode.RECRUIT_MANAGE, SearchMode.TALENT_BANK):
   776→        before_count = len(all_candidates)
   777→        all_candidates = [
   778→            c for c in all_candidates
   779→            if location in (c.title or "") or location in (c.location or "")
   780→        ]
   781→        if before_count > len(all_candidates):
   782→            console.print(f"[dim]地点筛选 '{location}': 排除 {before_count - len(all_candidates)} 人[/dim]")
   783→        if not all_candidates:
   784→            console.print("[yellow]地点筛选后无候选人。[/yellow]")
   785→            return
   786→
   787→    # Save checkpoint after search (batch_pages=0 marks non-batch mode)
   788→    _save_checkpoint(
   789→        checkpoint,
   790→        keywords,
   791→        template,
   792→        variables,
   793→        company,
   794→        location,
   795→        max_pages,
   796→        0,
   797→        skip_messaged,
   798→        interactive,
   799→        max_pages,
   800→        [],
   801→        seen_ids,
   802→        {"total": 0, "sent": 0, "failed": 0, "skipped": 0, "rate_limited": 0},
   803→        mode=mode.value,
   804→        dry_run=dry_run,
   805→        exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   806→        exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   807→        min_years=min_years,
   808→        max_years=max_years,
   809→    )
   810→
   811→    display_candidates_table(all_candidates, "Pipeline Results")
   812→
   813→    if dry_run:
   814→        console.print(
   815→            f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] {len(all_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]"
   816→        )
   817→        save_run_history(
   818→            keywords,
   819→            template,
   820→            mode,
   821→            {"total": len(all_candidates), "sent": 0, "failed": 0, "skipped": 0, "rate_limited": 0},
   822→            dry_run=True,
   823→        )
   824→        checkpoint.delete()
   825→        return
   826→
   827→    results = await send_batch(
   828→        all_candidates,
   829→        template,
   830→        variables,
   831→        list(keywords),
   832→        browser,
   833→        skip_messaged,
   834→        interactive,
   835→        skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
   836→        mode=mode,
   837→        exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
   838→        exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
   839→    )
   840→
   841→    # Fetch final quota for summary display
   842→    quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
   843→    display_send_results(results, quota=quota)
   844→    report_path = generate_pipeline_report(all_candidates, results, keywords, template, mode)
   845→    save_run_history(keywords, template, mode, results, dry_run=False, report_path=report_path)
   846→
   847→    # 本次运行总结
   848→    from rich.panel import Panel
   849→    years_desc = ""
   850→    if min_years is not None or max_years is not None:
   851→        years_desc = f"工作年限: {min_years or 0}-{max_years or '∞'}年"
   852→    summary_lines = [
   853→        f"关键词: {', '.join(keywords)}",
   854→        f"模板: {template}",
   855→        f"模式: {mode.value}",
   856→        f"地点: {location or '-'}",
   857→        years_desc or "",
   858→        f"候选人总数: {results['total']}",
   859→        f"已发送: {results['sent']} | 跳过(已沟通): {results['skipped']} | 失败: {results['failed']} | 限流: {results['rate_limited']}",
   860→        f"报告: {report_path}",
   861→    ]
   862→    summary_text = "\n".join(line for line in summary_lines if line)
   863→    console.print(Panel(summary_text, title="本次运行总结", border_style="green"))
   864→
   865→    # Clean up checkpoint on successful completion
   866→    checkpoint.delete()
   867→    console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
   868→
   869→    # Auto backup database after successful pipeline
   870→    _auto_backup_database()
   871→
   872→
   873→async def run_pipeline_batched(
   874→    browser: BrowserManager,
   875→    keywords: Tuple[str, ...],
   876→    company: Tuple[str, ...],
   877→    location: Optional[str],
   878→    max_pages: int,
   879→    batch_pages: int,
   880→    template: str,
   881→    variables: Dict[str, str],
   882→    dry_run: bool,
   883→    skip_messaged: bool,
   884→    interactive: bool = False,
   885→    resume_ckpt=None,
   886→    mode: SearchMode = SearchMode.SEARCH_CENTER,
   887→    skip_confirmation: bool = False,
   888→    exchange_phone: bool = False,
   889→    exchange_wechat: bool = False,
   890→    min_years: Optional[int] = None,
   891→    max_years: Optional[int] = None,
   892→) -> None:
   893→    """Batched pipeline: search N pages, send messages, repeat."""
   894→    # Restore state from checkpoint or start fresh
   895→    if resume_ckpt:
   896→        # On resume, only treat sent_ids as truly "seen" (skip-worthy).
   897→        # Candidates that were found but not sent should be retried.
   898→        sent_ids = list(resume_ckpt.sent_ids)
   899→        seen_ids = set(sent_ids)  # only skip candidates already successfully sent
   900→        total_results = resume_ckpt.total_results or {
   901→            "total": 0,
   902→            "sent": 0,
   903→            "failed": 0,
   904→            "skipped": 0,
   905→            "rate_limited": 0,
   906→        }
   907→        start_from_page = resume_ckpt.completed_pages + 1
   908→        console.print(
   909→            f"[cyan]Resuming from page {start_from_page} (sent: {len(sent_ids)}, retrying unsent)[/cyan]"
   910→        )
   911→        checkpoint = resume_ckpt
   912→    else:
   913→        seen_ids = set()
   914→        sent_ids = []
   915→        total_results = {"total": 0, "sent": 0, "failed": 0, "skipped": 0, "rate_limited": 0}
   916→        start_from_page = 1
   917→        checkpoint = CheckpointManager()
   918→
   919→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   920→    all_details: List[dict] = []
   921→    batch_num = 0
   922→    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   923→
   924→    batch_start = start_from_page
   925→    while batch_start <= max_pages:
   926→        batch_page_count = min(batch_pages, max_pages - batch_start + 1)
   927→        batch_num += 1
   928→        batch_end = batch_start + batch_page_count - 1
   929→
   930→        console.print(
   931→            f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Batch {batch_num}: Pages {batch_start}-{batch_end} ━━━[/bold magenta]"
   932→        )
   933→
   934→        if mode == SearchMode.ENTERPRISE:
   935→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_enterprise(
   936→                browser,
   937→                keywords,
   938→                company,
   939→                batch_page_count,
   940→                keep_last_tab_open=not dry_run,
   941→            )
   942→        elif mode == SearchMode.TALENT_BANK:
   943→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_talent_bank(
   944→                browser,
   945→                keywords,
   946→                company,
   947→                batch_page_count,
   948→                min_years=min_years if batch_num == 1 else None,
   949→            )
   950→        elif mode == SearchMode.RECRUIT_MANAGE:
   951→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords_recruit_manage(
   952→                browser,
   953→                keywords,
   954→                company,
   955→                batch_page_count,
   956→                min_years=min_years if batch_num == 1 else None,
   957→                max_years=max_years if batch_num == 1 else None,
   958→            )
   959→        else:
   960→            batch_candidates, _ = await search_all_keywords(
   961→                browser,
   962→                keywords,
   963→                company,
   964→                location,
   965→                batch_page_count,
   966→                start_page=batch_start,
   967→            )
   968→        # Filter out globally seen IDs
   969→        batch_candidates = [c for c in batch_candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
   970→        seen_ids.update(c.maimai_id for c in batch_candidates)
   971→        all_candidates.extend(batch_candidates)
   972→
   973→        if not batch_candidates:
   974→            consecutive_empty_batches += 1
   975→            console.print(f"[yellow]No new candidates in batch {batch_num}.[/yellow]")
   976→
   977→            if consecutive_empty_batches >= 2:
   978→                console.print(
   979→                    "[red]Multiple consecutive empty batches detected. Verifying login status...[/red]"
   980→                )
   981→                if not await check_login_status(browser.page):
   982→                    console.print(
   983→                        "[red]Session expired! Clearing session and re-authenticating...[/red]"
   984→                    )
   985→                    session_manager = get_session_manager()
   986→                    await session_manager.clear()
   987→                    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   988→                    consecutive_empty_batches = 0
   989→                    console.print("[green]Re-authenticated. Retrying current batch...[/green]")
   990→                    batch_num -= 1
   991→                    continue
   992→                else:
   993→                    console.print(
   994→                        "[yellow]Session appears valid. Possibly no more results for these keywords.[/yellow]"
   995→                    )
   996→
   997→            _save_checkpoint(
   998→                checkpoint,
   999→                keywords,
  1000→                template,
  1001→                variables,
  1002→                company,
  1003→                location,
  1004→                max_pages,
  1005→                batch_pages,
  1006→                skip_messaged,
  1007→                interactive,
  1008→                batch_end,
  1009→                sent_ids,
  1010→                seen_ids,
  1011→                total_results,
  1012→                mode=mode.value,
  1013→                dry_run=dry_run,
  1014→                exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
  1015→                exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
  1016→                min_years=min_years,
  1017→            )
  1018→            batch_start += batch_pages
  1019→            continue
  1020→        else:
  1021→            consecutive_empty_batches = 0
  1022→
  1023→        display_candidates_table(batch_candidates, f"Batch {batch_num} Results")
  1024→
  1025→        if dry_run:
  1026→            console.print(
  1027→                f"\n[cyan][Dry Run] Batch {batch_num}: {len(batch_candidates)} candidates found. No messages sent.[/cyan]"
  1028→            )
  1029→            _save_checkpoint(
  1030→                checkpoint,
  1031→                keywords,
  1032→                template,
  1033→                variables,
  1034→                company,
  1035→                location,
  1036→                max_pages,
  1037→                batch_pages,
  1038→                skip_messaged,
  1039→                interactive,
  1040→                batch_end,
  1041→                sent_ids,
  1042→                seen_ids,
  1043→                total_results,
  1044→                mode=mode.value,
  1045→                dry_run=dry_run,
  1046→                exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
  1047→                exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
  1048→                min_years=min_years,
  1049→            )
  1050→            batch_start += batch_pages
  1051→            continue
  1052→
  1053→        results = await send_batch(
  1054→            batch_candidates,
  1055→            template,
  1056→            variables,
  1057→            list(keywords),
  1058→            browser,
  1059→            skip_messaged,
  1060→            interactive,
  1061→            skip_confirmation=skip_confirmation,
  1062→            mode=mode,
  1063→            exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
  1064→            exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
  1065→        )
  1066→        batch_quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
  1067→        display_send_results(results, title=f"Batch {batch_num} Send Results", quota=batch_quota)
  1068→
  1069→        all_details.extend(results.get("details", []))
  1070→        for detail in results.get("details", []):
  1071→            if detail.get("status") == "sent":
  1072→                sent_ids.append(detail["maimai_id"])
  1073→
  1074→        for key in total_results:
  1075→            total_results[key] += results.get(key, 0)
  1076→
  1077→        _save_checkpoint(
  1078→            checkpoint,
  1079→            keywords,
  1080→            template,
  1081→            variables,
  1082→            company,
  1083→            location,
  1084→            max_pages,
  1085→            batch_pages,
  1086→            skip_messaged,
  1087→            interactive,
  1088→            batch_end,
  1089→            sent_ids,
  1090→            seen_ids,
  1091→            total_results,
  1092→            mode=mode.value,
  1093→            dry_run=dry_run,
  1094→            exchange_phone=exchange_phone,
  1095→            exchange_wechat=exchange_wechat,
  1096→            min_years=min_years,
  1097→        )
  1098→        console.print(f"[dim]Checkpoint saved (page {batch_end})[/dim]")
  1099→
  1100→        batch_start += batch_pages
  1101→
  1102→    # Final summary
  1103→    console.print(f"\n[bold magenta]━━━ Pipeline Complete ━━━[/bold magenta]")
  1104→    console.print(f"Total unique candidates found: {len(seen_ids)}")
  1105→    report_path = None
  1106→    if not dry_run and total_results["total"] > 0:
  1107→        final_quota = await fetch_contact_quota(browser)
  1108→        display_send_results(total_results, title="Overall Send Results", quota=final_quota)
  1109→        total_results_with_details = {**total_results, "details": all_details}
  1110→        report_path = generate_pipeline_report(
  1111→            all_candidates, total_results_with_details, keywords, template, mode
  1112→        )
  1113→
  1114→    history_results = (
  1115→        total_results
  1116→        if not dry_run
  1117→        else {
  1118→            "total": len(seen_ids),
  1119→            "sent": 0,
  1120→            "failed": 0,
  1121→            "skipped": 0,
  1122→            "rate_limited": 0,
  1123→        }
  1124→    )
  1125→    save_run_history(keywords, template, mode, history_results, dry_run, report_path)
  1126→
  1127→    checkpoint.delete()
  1128→    console.print("[dim]Checkpoint cleared (pipeline complete)[/dim]")
  1129→
  1130→    # Auto backup database after successful batched pipeline
  1131→    _auto_backup_database()
  1132→
  1133→
  1134→def _save_checkpoint(
  1135→    checkpoint,
  1136→    keywords,
  1137→    template,
  1138→    variables,
  1139→    company,
  1140→    location,
  1141→    max_pages,
  1142→    batch_pages,
  1143→    skip_messaged,
  1144→    interactive,
  1145→    completed_pages,
  1146→    sent_ids,
  1147→    seen_ids,
  1148→    total_results,
  1149→    mode: str = "search_center",
  1150→    dry_run: bool = False,
  1151→    exchange_phone: bool = False,
  1152→    exchange_wechat: bool = False,
  1153→    min_years: Optional[int] = None,
  1154→    max_years: Optional[int] = None,
  1155→) -> None:

  1157→    checkpoint.save(

  1159→        template=template,
  1160→        variables=variables,

  1173→        exchange_phone=exchange_phone,

data.prompt:
全面扫描 maimai-assistant 项目的代码质量问题。这是第 13 次代码审查。

**重点关注**：
1. **代码缺陷**：bug、逻辑错误、异常处理不当、未捕获的异常
2. **安全隐患**：硬编码凭证、注入风险、路径遍历
3. **性能问题**：N+1 查询、不必要的重复计算、阻塞操作
4. **架构问题**：循环依赖、职责不清
5. **代码风格**：函数内 import（历史反复出现）、重复代码
6. **配置问题**：硬编码值、缺少校验

**已知遗留项（不要重复报告）**：
- 循环依赖 message↔selector_discovery（deferred import 可工作）
- 测试覆盖率低（已知，本次不重复报告）

**排除范围**：
- venv/ 目录
- __pycache__/ 目录
- .git/ 目录

**输出格式**：
按严重程度（严重 > 中等 > 轻微）列出发现的问题，每个问题包括：
- 文件路径和行号
- 问题描述
- 为什么是问题
- 建议修复方式

请仔细检查 src/ 目录下的所有 Python 文件，特别是：
- src/modules/ (search.py, message.py, profile.py, auth.py, export.py)
- src/services/pipeline.py
- src/cli/main.py
- src/core/ (browser.py, session.py, anti_detection.py)
- src/utils/ (所有文件)
- src/models/ (database.py, migrations.py)

1→"""Search module for finding candidates on Maimai.
     2→
     3→Handles candidate search with filters, pagination,
     4→and extraction of basic candidate information.
     5→"""
     6→
     7→import asyncio
     8→from dataclasses import dataclass
     9→from typing import List, Optional
    10→
    11→from patchright.async_api import Page
    12→from loguru import logger
    13→from rich.console import Console
    14→from rich.progress import Progress, SpinnerColumn, TextColumn
    15→
    16→from src.core.browser import BrowserManager, get_browser_manager
    17→from src.core.anti_detection import human_scroll, human_type
    18→from src.modules.auth import ensure_logged_in
    19→from src.utils.config import get_config
    20→from src.utils.rate_limiter import get_rate_limiter, async_check_rate_limit
    21→from src.utils.delays import async_random_delay
    22→from src.utils.retry import retry_navigation
    23→from src.utils.validators import validate_keywords
    24→from src.utils.captcha import check_captcha
    25→from src.models.database import Candidate, SearchHistory, get_db_manager
    26→from src.exceptions.errors import (
    27→    BrowserError,
    28→    SessionExpiredError,
    29→    SelectorNotFoundError,
    30→)
    31→
    32→console = Console()
    33→
    34→
    35→# Maimai search URL
    36→MAIMAI_SEARCH_URL = "https://maimai.cn/web/search_center"
    37→
    38→# Names indicating paid/premium-only profiles that should be skipped
    39→PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES = {"脉脉高价值人脉"}
    40→
    41→# Keywords indicating non-R&D roles (to be filtered out)
    42→NON_RD_KEYWORDS = {
    43→    "销售", "运营", "产品", "市场", "电子商务", "电商",
    44→    "商务", "品牌", "公关", "客服", "采购", "招商",
    45→    "人力", "人事", "HR", "HRBP", "行政",
    46→    "财务", "会计", "审计", "法务", "法律", "合规",
    47→    "内容", "编辑", "翻译", "教育", "培训", "教学",
    48→    "物流", "供应链", "仓储",
    49→}
    50→
    51→
    52→
    53→def _is_non_rd_title(title: str) -> bool:
    54→    """Check if a title indicates a non-R&D role.
    55→
    56→    Strict mode: if any non-R&D keyword appears, filter out regardless of
    57→    whether R&D keywords are also present (e.g. "技术产品经理" is filtered).
    58→    Returns False (keep) only if title is empty or contains no non-R&D keywords.
    59→    """
    60→    if not title:
    61→        return False
    62→
    63→    # Strict: any non-R&D keyword present → filter out (case-insensitive)
    64→    title_lower = title.lower()
    65→    if any(kw.lower() in title_lower for kw in NON_RD_KEYWORDS):
    66→        return True
    67→
    68→    return False
    69→
    70→
    71→@dataclass
    72→class CandidateBasic:
    73→    """Basic candidate information from search results."""
    74→    maimai_id: str
    75→    name: str
    76→    title: str
    77→    company: str
    78→    location: Optional[str] = None
    79→    profile_url: Optional[str] = None
    80→    score: Optional[int] = None  # populated by scoring module
    81→
    82→
    83→async def search_candidates(
    84→    keywords: str,
    85→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
    86→    location: Optional[str] = None,
    87→    pages: int = 1,
    88→    start_page: int = 1,
    89→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None
    90→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
    91→    """
    92→    Search for candidates on Maimai.
    93→
    94→    Args:
    95→        keywords: Search keywords (e.g., "高级前端工程师")
    96→        company: Filter by company names, tuple of strings (optional)
    97→        location: Filter by location (optional)
    98→        pages: Number of pages to scrape (default 1)
    99→        start_page: First page number to scrape (default 1)
   100→        browser: Browser manager instance
   101→
   102→    Returns:
   103→        List of CandidateBasic objects
   104→
   105→    Raises:
   106→        RateLimitExceededError: If rate limit exceeded
   107→        SelectorNotFoundError: If page elements not found
   108→    """
   109→    # Validate inputs
   110→    validate_keywords(keywords)
   111→
   112→    if browser is None:
   113→        browser = get_browser_manager()
   114→
   115→    config = get_config()
   116→    rate_limiter = get_rate_limiter()
   117→    db_manager = get_db_manager()
   118→
   119→    # Ensure logged in
   120→    await ensure_logged_in(browser)
   121→
   122→    all_candidates: List[CandidateBasic] = []
   123→    seen_ids: set = set()  # Deduplicate across infinite-scroll extractions
   124→
   125→    with Progress(
   126→        SpinnerColumn(),
   127→        TextColumn("[progress.description]{task.description}"),
   128→        console=console
   129→    ) as progress:
   130→
   131→        end_page = start_page + pages
   132→        for page_num in range(start_page, end_page):
   133→            task = progress.add_task(f"Searching page {page_num}/{end_page - 1}...", total=None)
   134→
   135→            try:
   136→                # Check rate limit (waits through min-interval)
   137→                await async_check_rate_limit('search')
   138→
   139→                page = browser.page
   140→
   141→                if page_num == start_page:
   142→                    # First page: interactive search (maimai SPA ignores URL query params)
   143→                    await retry_navigation(page, MAIMAI_SEARCH_URL, wait_until='domcontentloaded')
   144→                    await asyncio.sleep(1)
   145→
   146→                    # Find search input and type keyword
   147→                    search_input = (
   148→                        await page.query_selector('input[placeholder="搜索"]')
   149→                        or await page.query_selector('input[type="search"]')
   150→                        or await page.query_selector('.search-input input, .header input[type="text"]')
   151→                    )
   152→                    if not search_input:
   153→                        raise SelectorNotFoundError("Search input not found on search center page")
   154→
   155→                    await search_input.click()
   156→                    await search_input.fill(keywords)
   157→                    await asyncio.sleep(0.5)
   158→                    await page.keyboard.press('Enter')
   159→                    await asyncio.sleep(2)
   160→
   161→                    # Default tab is 实名动态(feed); switch to 人脉(contacts)
   162→                    renmai_tab = await page.query_selector(':text-is("人脉")')
   163→                    if renmai_tab:
   164→                        await renmai_tab.click()
   165→                        await asyncio.sleep(2)
   166→                    else:
   167→                        logger.warning("Could not find '人脉' tab on search results page")
   168→                else:
   169→                    # Subsequent pages: scroll to load more (infinite scroll)
   170→                    prev_count = await page.evaluate(
   171→                        'document.querySelectorAll(\'[id^="contactcard_"]\').length'
   172→                    )
   173→                    await human_scroll(page, 'down', distance=1500)
   174→                    # Wait for new cards to load
   175→                    try:
   176→                        await page.wait_for_function(
   177→                            f'''() => {{
   178→                                const cards = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   179→                                return cards.length > {prev_count};
   180→                            }}''',
   181→                            timeout=8000,
   182→                        )
   183→                    except TimeoutError:
   184→                        logger.debug(f"No new cards after scroll (had {prev_count})")
   185→                    except Exception as e:
   186→                        logger.warning(f"Error waiting for new cards after scroll: {e}")
   187→
   188→                # Wait for contactcard elements
   189→                try:
   190→                    await page.wait_for_function(
   191→                        '''() => {
   192→                            const cards = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   193→                            return cards.length >= 1;
   194→                        }''',
   195→                        timeout=8000,
   196→                    )
   197→                except TimeoutError:
   198→                    logger.debug("Timed out waiting for contactcard elements, proceeding anyway")
   199→                except Exception as e:
   200→                    logger.warning(f"Error waiting for contactcard elements: {e}")
   201→
   202→                # Extract candidates from this page
   203→                candidates = await _extract_search_results(page, config)
   204→
   205→                # Deduplicate: infinite scroll re-extracts all visible cards
   206→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.maimai_id not in seen_ids]
   207→                for c in candidates:
   208→                    seen_ids.add(c.maimai_id)
   209→
   210→                # Anti-detection: human behavior AFTER extraction
   211→                await check_captcha(page, report_to_rate_limiter=True)
   212→                await human_scroll(page, 'down', distance=300)
   213→                await async_random_delay('action')
   214→
   215→                if not candidates:
   216→                    logger.info(f"No results found on page {page_num}")
   217→                    await browser.screenshot(f"search_debug_page{page_num}")
   218→                    progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: No results")
   219→                    # Allow one empty page (could be transient), break on second consecutive
   220→                    if page_num > start_page and not all_candidates:
   221→                        # First page had no results either — genuinely empty
   222→                        break
   223→                    continue
   224→
   225→                # Filter out non-R&D roles
   226→                before_rd_filter = len(candidates)
   227→                candidates = [c for c in candidates if not _is_non_rd_title(c.title)]
   228→                rd_filtered = before_rd_filter - len(candidates)
   229→                if rd_filtered > 0:
   230→                    logger.info(f"Filtered out {rd_filtered} non-R&D candidates")
   231→
   232→                # Apply filters if specified
   233→                if company:
   234→                    company_lower = [cn.lower() for cn in company]
   235→                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.company and any(cn in c.company.lower() for cn in company_lower)]
   236→
   237→                if location:
   238→                    candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.location and location.lower() in c.location.lower()]
   239→
   240→                all_candidates.extend(candidates)
   241→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Found {len(candidates)} candidates")
   242→
   243→                # Log the action
   244→                rate_limiter.log_action('search', {
   245→                    'keywords': keywords,
   246→                    'page': page_num,
   247→                    'results': len(candidates)
   248→                })
   249→
   250→                # Save candidates to database
   251→                try:
   252→                    _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates, keywords)
   253→                except Exception as e:
   254→                    console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: Failed to save candidates to DB: {e}[/yellow]")
   255→
   256→                # Delay before next page
   257→                if page_num < end_page - 1:
   258→                    await async_random_delay('page_load')
   259→
   260→            except (BrowserError, SessionExpiredError):
   261→                raise  # Critical errors must propagate
   262→            except Exception as e:
   263→                logger.error(f"Error on page {page_num}: {e}")
   264→                progress.update(task, description=f"Page {page_num}: Error - {str(e)[:30]}")
   265→                # Take screenshot for debugging
   266→                await browser.screenshot(f"search_error_page{page_num}")
   267→                continue
   268→
   269→    # Log search to history
   270→    _log_search_history(db_manager, keywords, company, location, pages, len(all_candidates))
   271→
   272→    console.print(f"[green]Search complete. Found {len(all_candidates)} candidates.[/green]")
   273→    return all_candidates
   274→
   275→
   276→async def _extract_search_results(page: Page, config) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   277→    """
   278→    Extract candidate information from search results page.
   279→
   280→    Args:
   281→        page: Playwright page instance
   282→        config: Config instance
   283→
   284→    Returns:
   285→        List of CandidateBasic objects
   286→    """
   287→    candidates = []
   288→
   289→    # NOTE: The caller (search_candidates) already waits for contactcard_
   290→    # elements before calling this function.  Maimai's SPA strips URL
   291→    # params within ~5-8s and clears results, so we must NOT add long
   292→    # waits here (no networkidle, no loading-text polling).
   293→
   294→    try:
   295→        # Strategy: Extract candidates by finding avatar images and their associated text
   296→        candidates_data = await page.evaluate('''() => {
   297→            const candidates = [];
   298→            const seenNames = new Set();
   299→
   300→            // Find all images that look like avatars
   301→            const images = document.querySelectorAll('img');
   302→
   303→            for (const img of images) {
   304→                // Skip large images (probably not avatars)
   305→                const rect = img.getBoundingClientRect();
   306→                if (rect.width > 100 || rect.height > 100) continue;
   307→                if (rect.width < 20 || rect.height < 20) continue;
   308→
   309→                // Find parent container (the card)
   310→                let card = img.parentElement;
   311→                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   312→                    const cardRect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
   313→                    // Look for a reasonable card size
   314→                    if (cardRect.width > 200 && cardRect.height > 50 && cardRect.height < 200) {
   315→                        break;
   316→                    }
   317→                    card = card.parentElement;
   318→                }
   319→
   320→                if (!card) continue;
   321→
   322→                // Get all text nodes from card, preserving order
   323→                const textParts = [];
   324→                const walker = document.createTreeWalker(card, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT, null, false);
   325→                while (walker.nextNode()) {
   326→                    const text = walker.currentNode.textContent.trim();
   327→                    if (text && text.length > 0 && text.length < 100) {
   328→                        textParts.push(text);
   329→                    }
   330→                }
   331→
   332→                // Parse candidate info from text parts
   333→                // Pattern: Name, Activity time, Company+Position, Industry|Department
   334→                let name = '';
   335→                let company = '';
   336→                let title = '';
   337→                let industry = '';
   338→
   339→                // Compound job title patterns (longer patterns first for greedy match)
   340→                const jobPatterns = [
   341→                    // Compound titles with prefix modifiers
   342→                    /(?:高级|资深|首席|初级|中级|senior|junior|staff|principal|lead)?\s*(?:前端|后端|全栈|web|Web|iOS|Android|Java|Python|Go|C\+\+|PHP|.NET|算法|数据|AI|机器学习|深度学习|NLP|大数据|云计算|DevOps|SRE|安全|测试|嵌入式|移动端|客户端|服务端|区块链|具身智能|自动驾驶|机器人)?\s*(?:工程师|开发|架构师|专家|技术经理|技术总监|技术负责人|Tech\s*Lead)/i,
   343→                    // Management titles
   344→                    /(?:技术|产品|运营|市场|销售|人力|财务|行政|项目|研发)?\s*(?:总监|经理|主管|负责人|VP|总裁|副总|合伙人|创始人|董事|CEO|CTO|COO|CFO|CMO|CHO|CIO)/i,
   345→                    // Other roles
   346→                    /(?:产品|UI|UX|交互|视觉)?\s*(?:设计师|分析师|顾问|运营|助理|实习生?)/i,
   347→                ];
   348→
   349→                // Patterns for text that should be skipped
   350→                const skipPatterns = [
   351→                    /^[+＋]\s*好友$/,          // "+ 好友" button
   352→                    /^\d+个共同好友$/,           // "1个共同好友" social label
   353→                    /^共同好友/,                 // "共同好友..." variants
   354→                    /^已关注$/,                  // "已关注" button
   355→                    /^添加好友$/,                // "添加好友" button
   356→                    /^关注$/,                    // "关注" button
   357→                    /^好友$/,                    // "好友" label
   358→                    /^[|｜·]$/,                  // separators
   359→                ];
   360→
   361→                const isSkippable = (text) => {
   362→                    if (skipPatterns.some(p => p.test(text))) return true;
   363→                    // Activity time
   364→                    if (/天前|小时前|分钟前|刚刚|活跃|在线/.test(text)) return true;
   365→                    // Social relationship labels
   366→                    if (/同行|前同事|校友|共同好友/.test(text)) return true;
   367→                    return false;
   368→                };
   369→
   370→                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
   371→                    const part = textParts[i];
   372→
   373→                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
   374→
   375→                    // First short text (2-15 chars, pure CJK/letters) is likely the name
   376→                    if (!name && part.length >= 2 && part.length <= 15) {
   377→                        if (/^[\u4e00-\u9fa5a-zA-Z·\s()（）]+$/.test(part)) {
   378→                            name = part.replace(/[（(][^)）]*[）)]/g, '').trim();
   379→                            continue;
   380→                        }
   381→                    }
   382→
   383→                    // After name, next substantial text is company+position
   384→                    if (name && !company && part.length > 2) {
   385→                        // Try to split company and position using regex patterns
   386→                        let splitDone = false;
   387→                        for (const pattern of jobPatterns) {
   388→                            const match = part.match(pattern);
   389→                            if (match && match.index > 0) {
   390→                                company = part.substring(0, match.index).trim();
   391→                                title = match[0].trim();
   392→                                splitDone = true;
   393→                                break;
   394→                            }
   395→                        }
   396→                        if (!splitDone) {
   397→                            company = part;
   398→                        }
   399→                        continue;
   400→                    }
   401→
   402→                    // Next part is industry|department info
   403→                    if (name && company && !industry && part.length > 2) {
   404→                        industry = part;
   405→                        // If title wasn't split from company, use industry as fallback context
   406→                        if (!title) {
   407→                            title = industry;
   408→                        }
   409→                        break;
   410→                    }
   411→                }
   412→
   413→                // Skip if no name found or premium placeholder
   414→                if (!name) continue;
   415→                if (name === '脉脉高价值人脉') continue;
   416→
   417→                // Extract user ID from DOM patterns on card and ancestor elements.
   418→                // Two patterns exist:
   419→                //   1. contactcard_{numeric_id} — on ancestors (colleagues layout)
   420→                //   2. member_entry_{numeric_id} — on descendants (standard layout)
   421→                let userId = '';
   422→
   423→                // Check ancestors for numeric contactcard_{id}
   424→                let el = card;
   425→                while (el) {
   426→                    const elId = el.id || '';
   427→                    const ccMatch = elId.match(/^contactcard_(\d+)$/);
   428→                    if (ccMatch) {
   429→                        userId = ccMatch[1];
   430→                        break;
   431→                    }
   432→                    el = el.parentElement;
   433→                }
   434→
   435→                // Check descendants for member_entry_{id} (most common pattern)
   436→                if (!userId) {
   437→                    const meEl = card.querySelector('[id^="member_entry_"]');
   438→                    if (meEl) {
   439→                        const meMatch = meEl.id.match(/^member_entry_(\d+)$/);
   440→                        if (meMatch) {
   441→                            userId = meMatch[1];
   442→                        }
   443→                    }
   444→                }
   445→
   446→                // Also check ancestor descendants for contactcard with numeric ID
   447→                if (!userId) {
   448→                    const ccEl = card.querySelector('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   449→                    if (ccEl) {
   450→                        const ccMatch = ccEl.id.match(/^contactcard_(\d+)$/);
   451→                        if (ccMatch) {
   452→                            userId = ccMatch[1];
   453→                        }
   454→                    }
   455→                }
   456→
   457→                // Use real user_id as maimai_id when available, fall back to hash
   458→                let maimaiId;
   459→                if (userId) {
   460→                    maimaiId = 'mm_' + userId;
   461→                } else {
   462→                    const idSource = (name || '') + '|' + (company || '') + '|' + (title || '');
   463→                    let hash = 0;
   464→                    for (let j = 0; j < idSource.length; j++) {
   465→                        const ch = idSource.charCodeAt(j);
   466→                        hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + ch;
   467→                        hash = hash & hash; // Convert to 32bit integer
   468→                    }
   469→                    maimaiId = 'mm_' + Math.abs(hash).toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
   470→                }
   471→
   472→                // Skip duplicates based on the computed ID
   473→                if (seenNames.has(maimaiId)) continue;
   474→                seenNames.add(maimaiId);
   475→
   476→                // Build profile URL from user ID when available
   477→                let profileUrl = '';
   478→                if (userId) {
   479→                    profileUrl = 'https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/' + userId + '?dstu=' + userId;
   480→                }
   481→
   482→                // Fallback: extract profile URL from <a> tags inside the card
   483→                if (!profileUrl) {
   484→                    let fallbackUrl = '';
   485→
   486→                    // First: check <a> ancestors between img and card
   487→                    let ancestor = img.parentElement;
   488→                    while (ancestor && ancestor !== card) {
   489→                        if (ancestor.tagName === 'A' && ancestor.href) {
   490→                            const href = ancestor.getAttribute('href') || '';
   491→                            if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('/u/') || href.includes('egid=') || href.includes('dstu=')) {
   492→                                profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   493→                                break;
   494→                            }
   495→                        }
   496→                        ancestor = ancestor.parentElement;
   497→                    }
   498→
   499→                    // Second: search all <a> descendants inside the card
   500→                    if (!profileUrl) {
   501→                        const links = card.querySelectorAll('a[href]');
   502→                        for (const link of links) {
   503→                            const href = link.getAttribute('href') || '';
   504→                            if (href.includes('/profile/detail') || href.includes('/contact/detail/') || href.includes('/u/') || href.includes('egid=') || href.includes('dstu=')) {
   505→                                profileUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   506→                                break;
   507→                            }
   508→                            if (!fallbackUrl && href && !href.startsWith('javascript:') && (href.startsWith('/') || href.includes('maimai.cn'))) {
   509→                                fallbackUrl = href.startsWith('http') ? href : 'https://maimai.cn' + href;
   510→                            }
   511→                        }
   512→                    }
   513→                    if (!profileUrl && fallbackUrl) {
   514→                        profileUrl = fallbackUrl;
   515→                    }
   516→                }
   517→
   518→                // Extract location: look for remaining short text parts after name/company/title
   519→                // Common patterns: city names like "北京", "上海", "深圳" etc.
   520→                let location = '';
   521→                const locationPatterns = /^(北京|上海|广州|深圳|杭州|成都|南京|武汉|西安|苏州|长沙|天津|重庆|郑州|东莞|青岛|大连|宁波|厦门|合肥|佛山|福州|昆明|济南|珠海|无锡|常州|海外|远程|香港|台北|新加坡|美国|日本|韩国|英国|全国|其他)/;
   522→                for (let i = 0; i < textParts.length; i++) {
   523→                    const part = textParts[i];
   524→                    if (part === name || part === company || part === title || part === industry) continue;
   525→                    if (isSkippable(part)) continue;
   526→                    if (locationPatterns.test(part) && part.length <= 10) {
   527→                        location = part;
   528→                        break;
   529→                    }
   530→                }
   531→
   532→                candidates.push({
   533→                    name: name,
   534→                    title: title || '',
   535→                    company: company || '',
   536→                    maimai_id: maimaiId,
   537→                    profile_url: profileUrl,
   538→                    location: location,
   539→                });
   540→            }
   541→
   542→            return candidates;
   543→        }''')
   544→
   545→        logger.info(f"JavaScript extraction found {len(candidates_data)} candidates")
   546→
   547→        for data in candidates_data:
   548→            if data.get('name'):
   549→                candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   550→                    maimai_id=data.get('maimai_id', ''),
   551→                    name=data.get('name', ''),
   552→                    title=data.get('title', ''),
   553→                    company=data.get('company', ''),
   554→                    location=data.get('location', ''),
   555→                    profile_url=data.get('profile_url', '')
   556→                ))
   557→
   558→        # For candidates missing profile_url, try extracting from contactcard DOM
   559→        missing_url = [c for c in candidates if not c.profile_url]
   560→        if missing_url:
   561→            logger.info(f"{len(missing_url)} candidates missing profile_url, searching contactcard DOM")
   562→            for c in missing_url:
   563→                try:
   564→                    profile_url = await _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page, c.name, c.company)
   565→                    if profile_url:
   566→                        c.profile_url = profile_url
   567→                except Exception as e:
   568→                    logger.debug(f"Contactcard lookup failed for '{c.name}': {e}")
   569→
   570→        # Fallback: Strategy 1 - Find all profile links directly
   571→        if not candidates:
   572→            profile_links = await page.query_selector_all('a[href*="/contact/"], a[href*="/u/"], a[href*="egid="], a[href*="profile"]')
   573→        else:
   574→            profile_links = []
   575→
   576→        if profile_links and not candidates:
   577→            logger.debug(f"Found {len(profile_links)} profile links")
   578→
   579→            seen_ids = set()
   580→            for link in profile_links:
   581→                try:
   582→                    href = await link.get_attribute('href')
   583→                    if not href:
   584→                        continue
   585→
   586→                    # Extract maimai_id from URL
   587→                    maimai_id = None
   588→                    if '/contact/detail/' in href:
   589→                        maimai_id = href.split('/contact/detail/')[-1].split('?')[0].split('/')[0]
   590→                    elif '/u/' in href:
   591→                        maimai_id = href.split('/u/')[-1].split('?')[0].split('/')[0]
   592→
   593→                    if not maimai_id or maimai_id in seen_ids:
   594→                        continue
   595→                    seen_ids.add(maimai_id)
   596→
   597→                    # Get name from link text
   598→                    name = await link.inner_text()
   599→                    name = name.strip()
   600→                    if not name or len(name) > 50:  # Skip if no name or too long (probably not a name)
   601→                        continue
   602→
   603→                    # Try to get parent container for more info
   604→                    parent = await link.evaluate_handle('el => el.closest("div, li, article") || el.parentElement.parentElement')
   605→
   606→                    title = ""
   607→                    company = ""
   608→
   609→                    if parent:
   610→                        # Get all text content and try to parse
   611→                        try:
   612→                            full_text = await parent.inner_text()
   613→                            lines = [l.strip() for l in full_text.split('\n') if l.strip()]
   614→
   615→                            # Usually: name, then title/company info
   616→                            for line in lines:
   617→                                if line == name:
   618→                                    continue
   619→                                if '好友' in line or '关注' in line:
   620→                                    continue
   621→                                if not title and len(line) < 50:
   622→                                    title = line
   623→                                elif not company and len(line) < 50:
   624→                                    company = line
   625→                                    break
   626→                        except Exception:
   627→                            pass  # Best-effort text parsing; proceed with partial data
   628→
   629→                    profile_url = href if href.startswith('http') else f"https://maimai.cn{href}"
   630→
   631→                    candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   632→                        maimai_id=maimai_id,
   633→                        name=name,
   634→                        title=title,
   635→                        company=company,
   636→                        profile_url=profile_url
   637→                    ))
   638→
   639→                except Exception as e:
   640→                    logger.debug(f"Failed to extract from link: {e}")
   641→                    continue
   642→
   643→        # Strategy 2: If no links found, try button-based detection
   644→        if not candidates:
   645→            logger.debug("Trying button-based detection")
   646→            buttons = await page.query_selector_all('button:has-text("好友"), button:has-text("关注")')
   647→
   648→            for button in buttons:
   649→                try:
   650→                    parent = await button.evaluate_handle('el => el.closest("div, li, article")')
   651→                    if not parent:
   652→                        continue
   653→
   654→                    # Find link in parent
   655→                    link = await parent.query_selector('a[href*="/contact"], a[href*="/u/"]')
   656→                    if link:
   657→                        href = await link.get_attribute('href')
   658→                        name = await link.inner_text()
   659→
   660→                        maimai_id = None
   661→                        if '/contact/detail/' in href:
   662→                            maimai_id = href.split('/contact/detail/')[-1].split('?')[0]
   663→                        elif '/u/' in href:
   664→                            maimai_id = href.split('/u/')[-1].split('?')[0]
   665→
   666→                        if maimai_id and name:
   667→                            candidates.append(CandidateBasic(
   668→                                maimai_id=maimai_id,
   669→                                name=name.strip(),
   670→                                title="",
   671→                                company="",
   672→                                profile_url=href
   673→                            ))
   674→                except Exception:
   675→                    continue
   676→
   677→        # Filter out premium placeholder profiles
   678→        before_filter = len(candidates)
   679→        candidates = [c for c in candidates if c.name not in PREMIUM_PLACEHOLDER_NAMES]
   680→        filtered_count = before_filter - len(candidates)
   681→        if filtered_count > 0:
   682→            logger.info(f"Filtered out {filtered_count} premium placeholder profiles")
   683→
   684→        logger.info(f"Extracted {len(candidates)} candidates from page")
   685→
   686→    except Exception as e:
   687→        logger.error(f"Error extracting search results: {e}")
   688→        console.print(f"[yellow]Warning: Search result extraction failed: {e}[/yellow]")
   689→
   690→    return candidates
   691→
   692→
   693→def _save_candidates_to_db(db_manager, candidates: List[CandidateBasic], source_search: str) -> None:
   694→    """
   695→    Save or update candidates in database.
   696→
   697→    Args:
   698→        db_manager: Database manager instance
   699→        candidates: List of candidates to save
   700→        source_search: Search keywords that found these candidates
   701→    """
   702→    try:
   703→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   704→            # Batch pre-fetch existing candidates to avoid N+1 queries
   705→            maimai_ids = [c.maimai_id for c in candidates]
   706→            existing_by_id = {
   707→                row.maimai_id: row
   708→                for row in session.query(Candidate).filter(
   709→                    Candidate.maimai_id.in_(maimai_ids)
   710→                ).all()
   711→            }
   712→
   713→            # Also batch-fetch by name+company for dedup
   714→            name_company_pairs = [(c.name, c.company) for c in candidates]
   715→            from sqlalchemy import tuple_
   716→            existing_by_name = {}
   717→            if name_company_pairs:
   718→                for row in session.query(Candidate).filter(
   719→                    tuple_(Candidate.name, Candidate.company).in_(name_company_pairs)
   720→                ).all():
   721→                    existing_by_name[(row.name, row.company)] = row
   722→
   723→            for c in candidates:
   724→                existing = existing_by_id.get(c.maimai_id)
   725→                if not existing:
   726→                    existing = existing_by_name.get((c.name, c.company))
   727→
   728→                if existing:
   729→                    existing.name = c.name
   730→                    existing.title = c.title
   731→                    existing.company = c.company
   732→                    existing.location = c.location
   733→                    existing.profile_url = c.profile_url
   734→                else:
   735→                    candidate = Candidate(
   736→                        maimai_id=c.maimai_id,
   737→                        name=c.name,
   738→                        title=c.title,
   739→                        company=c.company,
   740→                        location=c.location,
   741→                        profile_url=c.profile_url,
   742→                        source_search=source_search
   743→                    )
   744→                    session.add(candidate)
   745→
   746→            logger.debug(f"Saved {len(candidates)} candidates to database")
   747→
   748→    except Exception as e:
   749→        logger.error(f"Failed to save candidates to database: {e}")
   750→        raise
   751→
   752→
   753→def _log_search_history(
   754→    db_manager,
   755→    keywords: str,
   756→    company: Optional[tuple],
   757→    location: Optional[str],
   758→    pages: int,
   759→    results_count: int
   760→) -> None:
   761→    """Log search to history table."""
   762→    try:
   763→        with db_manager.session_scope() as session:
   764→            history = SearchHistory(
   765→                criteria={
   766→                    'keywords': keywords,
   767→                    'company': list(company) if company else None,
   768→                    'location': location,
   769→                    'pages': pages
   770→                },
   771→                results_count=results_count
   772→            )
   773→            session.add(history)
   774→    except Exception as e:
   775→        logger.error(f"Failed to log search history: {e}")
   776→
   777→
   778→async def _click_avatar_for_profile_url(page: Page, name: str, company: str) -> Optional[str]:
   779→    """Try to extract profile URL for a candidate from the DOM contactcard pattern.
   780→
   781→    Searches the current page for a contactcard element whose parent card
   782→    contains the candidate's name (and optionally company), then constructs
   783→    the profile URL from the extracted user ID.
   784→
   785→    Args:
   786→        page: Playwright page on the search results
   787→        name: Candidate name to match
   788→        company: Candidate company to help disambiguate
   789→
   790→    Returns:
   791→        Profile URL string, or None if not found
   792→    """
   793→    try:
   794→        user_id = await page.evaluate('''(args) => {
   795→            const { name, company } = args;
   796→            // Check contactcard_{numeric_id} ancestors
   797→            const ccElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="contactcard_"]');
   798→            for (const el of ccElements) {
   799→                const text = el.textContent || '';
   800→                if (!text.includes(name)) continue;
   801→                if (company && !text.includes(company)) continue;
   802→                const match = el.id.match(/^contactcard_(\\d+)$/);
   803→                if (match) return match[1];
   804→            }
   805→            // Check member_entry_{numeric_id} descendants
   806→            const meElements = document.querySelectorAll('[id^="member_entry_"]');
   807→            for (const el of meElements) {
   808→                // Walk up to find the card containing this member_entry
   809→                let card = el.parentElement;
   810→                for (let i = 0; i < 8 && card; i++) {
   811→                    const text = card.textContent || '';
   812→                    if (text.includes(name) && (!company || text.includes(company))) {
   813→                        const match = el.id.match(/^member_entry_(\\d+)$/);
   814→                        if (match) return match[1];
   815→                    }
   816→                    card = card.parentElement;
   817→                }
   818→            }
   819→            return null;
   820→        }''', {'name': name, 'company': company})
   821→
   822→        if user_id:
   823→            profile_url = f"https://maimai.cn/contact/detail/{user_id}?dstu={user_id}"
   824→            logger.info(f"Resolved profile_url for '{name}' via contactcard: {profile_url}")
   825→            return profile_url
   826→
   827→        logger.debug(f"No contactcard found for '{name}'")
   828→        return None
   829→
   830→    except Exception as e:
   831→        logger.debug(f"_click_avatar_for_profile_url error for '{name}': {e}")
   832→        return None
   833→
   834→
   835→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   836→# Enterprise recruitment path (Path B)
   837→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   838→
   839→MAIMAI_HOME_URL = "https://maimai.cn"
   840→ENTERPRISE_URL_MARKER = "ent/talents/discover"
   841→
   842→
   843→async def search_candidates_enterprise(
   844→    keywords: str,
   845→    company: Optional[tuple] = None,
   846→    pages: int = 1,
   847→    browser: Optional[BrowserManager] = None,
   848→    keep_tab_open: bool = False,
   849→) -> List[CandidateBasic]:
   850→    """Search for candidates via the enterprise recruitment path.
   851→
   852→    Flow:
   853→    1. Switch to primary tab -> navigate to homepage -> click "招聘" tab (opens new tab)
   854→    2. Wait for enterprise page to load
   855→    3. Add keyword filter -> submit
   856→    4. Optionally add company filter
   857→    5. Extract candidates from enterprise card layout
   858→    6. For additional pages, scroll to trigger infinite scroll
   859→    7. Close enterprise tab unless keep_tab_open is True
   860→
   861→    Args:
   862→        keywords: Search keywords
   863→        company: Filter by company names (optional)
   864→        pages: Number of scroll-pages to extract
